last_output: I was glad when I finally decided to pick up the guitar. The big challenge was finding time to practice every single day. Musicians who play fast songs often spend years perfecting their technique. Most teachers recommend that beginners start with simple scales and basic chords. Learning proper finger positioning can be quite hard for new students. Even tiny improvements in your playing ability can boost your confidence significantly. A clever practice routine involves mixing scales, songs, and music theory together. Many students end their lessons feeling accomplished and eager for more.
